entity.summary: Concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange in the Holdstation ecosystem, providing spot token swaps and liquidity pools across ZKsync Era and Berachain with residual liquidity and low recent trading activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party Holdstation exchange application remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Holdstation Swap as a Uniswap V3-style CLMM DEX and reports residual TVL plus non-zero 30-day and 7-day volume, but zero 24-hour volume and minimal recent fee activity in the reviewed snapshot. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status.

evidence.title: Holdstation official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Holdstation exchange application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript trading application shell.

evidence.title: Holdstation Swap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Holdstation Swap as a ZKsync Era and Berachain CLMM DEX and reports residual TVL, low recent fees, non-zero 30-day and 7-day DEX volume, and zero 24-hour volume, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Holdstation Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Holdstation Swap across ZKsync Era and Berachain and corroborates the exchange identity.
